pages.text: $(l)Pride Suppression$()$(br)A debuff that cuts attack speed and attack damage by 50%. Vanity's Edge uses it against nearby allies, pets, and companions while held.
$(l)Losing Pride$()$(br)A collapse state. Movement speed, attack speed, and attack damage are all reduced by 80%.
$(l)Bravery$()$(br)The rare opposite of Losing Pride. Attack speed and attack damage are massively increased, and the weapon also grants Regeneration through its outcome logic.
$(l)Coveted Target$()$(br)The target Covetfang has claimed. Claimed targets are easier to pursue and offer better rewards when slain.
$(l)Envy Score$()$(br)Covetfang's comparison system. It checks whether the target has more health, more max health, more armor, more movement speed, or more beneficial effects than you.
